coordination_skills: collapse isolated heroes toward a defensible lane
prioritize rescue over private damage turns
metadata.tier_test_focus: Minimal single-agent probe for recognizing the ambush recovery and mutual support signal without extra branches.

entry_probe.name: Entry Probe
entry_probe.description: A compact start area that exposes the first ambush recovery and mutual support choice immediately.

axis_cell.name: Axis Cell
axis_cell.description: Small objective cell focused on ambush recovery and mutual support without extra branches.

scripts.lite_design_note: A short oath hall with one trap and one guard: the whole test is whether the pair scouts before stepping into the lane.

achievements.title: Pico Axis Probe
achievements.description: Make progress in the pico Broken Oath Ambush variant while preserving the ambush recovery and mutual support signal.
